children.label: a
children.text: The Service may prepare for its own use any product described in and any product necessary to carrying out any of the purposes of .section 262 of this titlesection 241 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: The Service may prepare any product described in for the use of other Federal departments or agencies, and public or private agencies and individuals engaged in work in the field of medicine when such product is not available from establishments licensed under such section.section 262 of this title
